utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items requested in the final format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Now verify if each is fully specified with required details: (1) health_coverage: requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists integrated physical and mental health coverage and provides monthly and annual costs. Fully specified. (2) property_coverage: requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan lists a property coverage plan name, monthly and annual costs, and details referencing base policy and add-ons. Fully specified. (3) travel_coverage: requires travel insurance with costs. The plan provides plan name, monthly and annual costs, and details. Fully specified. (4) additional_services: requires any enhancement services with costs. The additional services list names and indicate costs are included in property_coverage; while individual numeric costs aren't repeated here, the property_coverage details specify the add-on costs (€40 and €60). This satisfies 'with costs'. Fully specified. (5) total_budget: requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides total monthly and annual costs. Fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three items: PrimeCare Premium Wellness Solution (health), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property) with Technology Protection and Emergency Response Service add-ons, and PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel). From the ground-truth ratings: PrimeCare Premium Plan appears in both physical and mental health with ratings 6 and 4 respectively, but the final plan bundles them as an integrated PrimeCare Premium Wellness Solution; the closest match by name is PrimeCare Premium Plan, which carries a rating of 6 in primary physical health and 4 in mental health—since only one rating can be assigned per listed item name, we map to the exact named item available: PrimeCare Premium Plan = 6. For property, PrimeHome Premium Coverage maps directly with rating 6. The additional services Technology Protection has rating 6 and Emergency Response Service has rating 3 under property_enhancement_services. For travel, PrimeTravel Premium Plan maps directly with rating 6.
